free_text: Experimental studies of neutron emission spectra in
Li(d,xn) reactions for IFMIF
Cyclotron and Radioisotope Center
- Target is natural.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness: 0.67 mm
AVF Cyclotron at Cyclotron and
Radioisotope Center
Detector resolution is 2 to 3 %.(The full width at
half maximum of the prompt gamma-ray peak (about
Two NE213 scintillation detectors for
high-energy and low-energy neutrons were placed
at about 11 m and 3.45 m, respectively.
The uncertainty of target thicknesses
The uncertainty of beam current measurements
The uncertainty of detector efficiency with
the SCINFUL-R code
The total normalization uncertainty
Generally below 10% but increased to
above 10% at the highest energy (<10%)
Received by e-mail from M.Hagiwara
MA and KY
